case_title: JOSEPH DICK VS. LIBERTY HOME SUPPLY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,300.00 FILED BY DICK, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT LIBERTY HOME SUPPLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $175.00) SERVED JUL-22-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIBERTY HOME SUPPLY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) EMMA CHANG, OWNER FILED BY DEFENDANT LIBERTY HOME SUPPLY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-19-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH DICK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LIBERTY HOME SUPPLY, REPRESENTED BY EMMA CHANG, OWNER IS PRESENT. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DICK, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIBERTY HOME SUPPLY $2,192.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,392.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
